variants: Fahim Choudhury calls Serpentine Ridge home, where he has been able to focus on his career at Oaken Wheel Games. Originally from Floral Reach, he pursued his education at Verdant Rise University, gaining the expertise that has propelled him in the gaming industry. At Oaken Wheel Games, Fahim primarily utilizes Persian Farsi as his working language, allowing for a smooth communication flow in his role. His journey from a small town to a prominent position in a creative industry is a testament to his dedication and skills.
